message: fix: use --no-frozen-lockfile in CI to bypass pnpmfileChecksum mismatch

files.patch:
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ jobs:
           node-version: 22
           cache: pnpm
 
-      - run: pnpm install
+      - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Install Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
           node-version: 22
           cache: pnpm
 
-      - run: pnpm install
+      - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Install Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
@@ -100,7 +100,7 @@ jobs:
           node-version: 22
           cache: pnpm
 
-      - run: pnpm install
+      - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Install Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
